scores.correctness_notes: Fully correct — covers all gold standard key facts (temp_model, deploy, wait, all_active, all_agents_idle, any_error, successes=3, local charm path convention) plus valid additional details.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'delay' parameter in juju.wait() is not mentioned in the gold standard and may not exist. The Status dataclass attribute paths (unit.workload_status.current, unit.agent_status.current) and app-name filtering on all_agents_idle go beyond verified API surface and may be inaccurate.
